title: MLS credential identity not bound to Ed25519 signing key
description: mls.rs MlsClient::new takes pub_id: &str and stores it as a BasicCredential, but the MLS signing key is a fresh ephemeral key with no cryptographic link to the Ed25519 identity. A crafted Welcome message to a client using pub_id X would cause that client to operate as X in the MLS group, enabling impersonation at the MLS layer. There is no out-of-band binding check between the MLS credential and the transport-layer Ed25519 identity. DESIGN.md §4 (sender identity enforcement) applies at the relay level but not end-to-end through MLS.
